visualizerParams.title: Recursive Directory Generator
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code uses `os.walk` (iterative) to traverse the directory. Refactor it to use a manual recursive function, which can provide more fine-grained control over the output formatting and nesting logic.

solution.explanation: A manual recursive implementation makes the hierarchical structure of the directory tree explicit in the code. It allows for easier formatting of folder headers and nested lists compared to tracking depth with `os.walk`.
